module.name: Quotes
module.description: Quote workflow from pricing and customer approval through order conversion.

fields.label: Sales Entity
fields.help_text: Choose which sales entity this script is available to.

fields.label: Expiry Date
fields.help_text: Required before generating the customer quote PDF.

fields.label: Sales Entity
fields.help_text: Controls entity-specific access, numbering, reporting, and which sales team should see this quote.

fields.label: Customer Contact
fields.help_text: Auto-filled from the selected contact person, but can be typed manually when the person record is not yet available.

fields.label: Customer Contact Email
fields.help_text: Auto-filled from the selected contact person or customer. Editable so the quote keeps contact details after reload.

fields.label: Customer Contact Phone
fields.help_text: Auto-filled from the selected contact person or customer. Editable so phone details can be captured directly on the quote.

fields.label: Currency
fields.help_text: Defaults from the customer. You can override it before line items are added.

fields.label: Quote Owner
fields.help_text: Internal owner for pipeline, activity, automations, and generated documents.

fields.label: Document Language
fields.help_text: Language used for quote document text and selected script content.

fields.label: Quote Script Template
fields.help_text: Selects a standard script and fills the editable quote text sections. Existing edited text is preserved unless it still matches the previous template.

fields.label: Payment Terms
fields.help_text: Customer-facing payment terms. Use this for longer staged or project-specific payment wording.

fields.label: Shipping Terms
fields.help_text: Customer-facing shipping, delivery, and logistics terms.

fields.label: Sector
fields.help_text: Commercial sector copied from the opportunity where available.

fields.label: Type of Crop
fields.help_text: Primary crop or crop group copied from the opportunity where available.

fields.label: Products
fields.help_text: Products, product family, or system type discussed with the customer.

fields.label: Spectrum
fields.help_text: Spectrum or lighting recipe requirement discussed for this quote.

fields.label: Company Address
fields.help_text: Customer company address snapshot for quote context.

fields.label: Site Address
fields.help_text: Project/site address snapshot for quote context.

fields.label: Quote Script
fields.help_text: Editable customer-facing script copied from the selected template and included in the generated quote document.

fields.label: Primary Document
fields.help_text: Linked document record created by the Generate Document action. The generated PDF is attached back to this quote.

fields.label: Generated Files
fields.help_text: Generated quote PDFs and related customer-facing files attached to this quote.

fields.label: Tax %
fields.help_text: Default VAT / sales tax rate for this quote. Usually inherited from the customer account and adjustable per quote.

fields.label: Inbound Freight / Delivery Cost to Us
fields.help_text: Internal freight or delivery cost not charged to the customer. Included in quote margin.

fields.label: Available Stock Snapshot
fields.help_text: Current available stock copied from the product. 0 is expected for made-to-order, custom, or non-stock products.

fields.label: Sell Unit Price
fields.help_text: Customer sell price for this quote line. Sales users can adjust this per quote.

fields.label: Unit Cost
fields.help_text: Quote cost snapshot copied from the product Quote Cost. Adjust for custom items so margin stays accurate.

fields.label: Buy Currency Snapshot
fields.help_text: Currency for the quote cost snapshot. Usually the quote cost currency from the selected product.

fields.label: Procurement Supplier
fields.help_text: Internal supplier/factory reference for operations and procurement. Hidden from Sales users.

fields.label: Supplier SKU Snapshot
fields.help_text: Supplier/factory product reference copied at quote time for internal procurement. Hidden from Sales users.

fields.label: Product Type
fields.help_text: Read-only product type copied at quote time so the quote stays stable if the catalogue changes later.

fields.label: Quote Cost Mode
fields.help_text: Copied from the product to explain whether this line uses catalogue cost, manual quote cost, or pass-through costing.

fields.label: Buy FX To Quote
fields.help_text: Exchange rate used to convert the quote cost into the quote currency for margin calculations.

fields.label: Buy Total
fields.help_text: Internal cost total before quote-currency conversion. Hidden from Sales users.

fields.label: Buy Total (Quote Currency)
fields.help_text: Internal cost total converted into the quote currency for margin calculations. Hidden from Sales users.

fields.label: Estimated Margin Amount
fields.help_text: Estimated margin for this quote line after quote cost conversion. Hidden from Sales users.

fields.label: Estimated Margin %
fields.help_text: Estimated margin percentage for this quote line. Hidden from Sales users.

confirm.title: Reset quote script from the selected template?
confirm.body: This replaces the quote-specific script with the current selected template content.

confirm.title: Send quote email?
confirm.body: Send the latest generated quote PDF to the customer and mark the quote as sent.

confirm.title: Mark quote as accepted?
confirm.body: Use this once the customer has accepted the quote and the deal is ready for order conversion.

confirm.title: Create order from quote?
confirm.body: This will create an Order and copy the accepted quote lines.

confirm.title: Generate quote document?
confirm.body: This creates or refreshes the linked quote document record, stores the generated file on this quote, and makes it visible in the Documents module.

modals.title: Mark Quote Lost
modals.description: Capture why the quote was lost before moving it out of the active pipeline.

modals.title: Mark Quote Expired
modals.description: Capture the expiry note before closing this quote out of the live pipeline.
